title: Macaw’s Glass Trapdoors Connected Textures
description: Makes the glass trapdoors from Macaw’s Trapdoors connect seamlessly using continuity
body:
Makes the glass trapdoors from Macaw’s Trapdoors connect seamlessly using continuity

NOTE: this resource pack has only been tested on 1.20.1, but it should work on newer and probably older versions as long as you have Continuity and Macaw's Trapdoors installed
